title: corylopsis henryi
intro: Corylopsis henryi, also known as the Yellow Winter Hazel or Henry's Spurge-flower, is a flowering plant native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The plant is rich in antioxidants and flavonoids, which provide health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, as well as cardiovascular protection. Corylopsis henryi can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or decoction for its herbal benefits, although more research is needed to fully understand its medicinal applications.
